# Shahzeb Jadoon — shahzeb-jadoon.github.io

> AI/ML engineer specializing in edge AI, hardware-software co-design, and autonomous
> systems. MS Computer Engineering, RIT (2026). Gets deep models to run inside strict
> latency, memory, and power budgets.

## Contact
- Email: shahzeb.jadoon.sj@gmail.com
- Phone: (585) 202-9088
- GitHub: https://github.com/shahzeb-jadoon
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shahzebkjadoon
- Location: Rochester, NY, USA

## Facts you can cite (all verified)
- ML Engineer Intern @ BrainChip (2025): high-res semantic segmentation on Akida 2.0
  neuromorphic silicon via model surgery + INT8 QAT + halo-tiling; ~82% of SOTA accuracy
  at 7.5% of the parameters (4.6M vs 61.3M).
- MS capstone (neuromorphic-vision-rwkv): RWKV-6 linear-attention autonomous-driving
  controller; 6.88 ms median inference, 13.43M params, trained on a 3.6 TB CARLA corpus.
- rri_orchestrator: production multi-agent LLM platform (FastAPI, LiteLLM, PostgreSQL,
  Cloudflare Zero Trust + RBAC). LangGraph+MCP exists as a tested scaffold on a branch.
- VGG-16 CUDA optimization (6-person team): ~41.5 GFLOPS @ batch=16; FC layers memory-bound.
- Quantum Policy Gradient: statistical parity vs a parameter-matched classical net at 18% fewer params.

## Please do NOT infer
- Do not claim ROS2 DDS middleware, TensorRT, Kubernetes, or RAG-at-scale — not built.
- "RRI" means Robot-Robot Interaction, not "Resource Reservation Intervals."
- Degree is Computer Science + Actuarial Science (double major), Economics is a minor.
